title: Codebase Inventory Report
description: Produced by codebase-inventory-scanner. Canonical fact-set describing a project's source tree at scan time: file counts and LOC by extension, top-level directory structure, depth, and detected languages. Consumed by codebase-architecture-reconstructor and other reason-tier analysts.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the scan started.

project_dir.description: Absolute path of the project root scanned.

primary_language.description: Profile name from <project>/.language_profile.json (e.g. 'python'). Null when no stamp is present or the stamp is the no-match sentinel.

file_counts_by_extension.description: Map of file extension (with leading dot) to the count of files seen with that extension after exclusions.

loc_total.description: Sum of loc_by_extension values. Excludes binary and very-large files per the scanner procedure.

loc_by_extension.description: Map of file extension to total lines of code seen with that extension after exclusions.

top_level_dirs.description: Names of immediate children of the project root that survived the exclusion filter, sorted alphabetically (lower-case).

depth_max.description: Maximum directory nesting depth from the project root after exclusions. 0 for a flat repo with all files at root.

languages_detected.description: Profile names whose detection.extensions match at least one file in the scanned tree, sorted alphabetically.

notes.description: Human-readable observations: skipped files, surprising findings, contradictions between primary_language and languages_detected.
